ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code for the country (e.g., AT for Austria) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Manual webscraping, Country website) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government agency, health organization) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "week_name" TEXT /* Week of the year the data was collected (e.g., W15, W16) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "new_cases" (
  "new_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each new case entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the data was collected */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data was collected */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week the data was collected */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of new COVID-19 cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("new_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_new_cases_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_new_cases_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_new_cases_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests_done" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the data was collected */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data was collected */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week the data was collected */,
  "tests" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 tests done */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_done_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_done_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_done_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_rates" (
  "testing_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing rate entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the data was collected */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data was collected */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week the data was collected */,
  "rate" REAL /* COVID-19 testing rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_rates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_rates_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positivity_rates" (
  "positivity_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each positivity rate entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the data was collected */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data was collected */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week the data was collected */,
  "rate" REAL /* COVID-19 positivity rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("positivity_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positivity_rates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positivity_rates_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positivity_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the data was collected */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data was collected */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., manual, automated, semi-automated) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view data, download data, update data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the data was collected */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data was collected */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week the data was collected */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the data was collected */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data was collected */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week the data was collected */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_version_history" (
  "version_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version history entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version associated with the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "hospital_address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "patient_age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "staff_role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., doctor, nurse, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)
